pi_items.source: task.json description and setup_veracrypt.sh explicitly create the volume at /home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc

setup_veracrypt.sh lines 63-65 where it explicitly copies these three files to the mounted volume

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target encrypted volume data_volume.hc is synthetically generated by setup scripts with the password 'MountMe2024' and contains exactly three files (SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt, FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv, backup_authorized_keys). The required evidence directory, manifest path, and report path exactly match the task description and export_result.sh evaluation checks.
